DP.057.0000:
[0103,0000]: Hunh?\f
Oh, it’s you, [0103,0001]!
You finally got here?\r
You’re slow like always.\f
You’re so slow, the Gym Leader’s
long gone now.\f
He said he had to go... Uh...
Oh, yeah, to Oreburgh Mine!\f
I got my Badge already, so it’s no
big deal to me, but...
DP.057.0001:
[0103,0000]: I told you, the Gym
Leader isn’t here.\f
If you want to take the Gym
challenge, you’d better go down to\r
the mine and ask him.\f
But, boy, a Gym Leader is in a
different class of toughness.\f
Even I’m feeling run down.
DP.057.0003:
[0103,0000]: Whoops! [0103,0001]!
You got the Gym Badge, huh?\f
Eterna City is the next place with
a Gym that gives away Badges, right?\f
DP.057.0004:
So, yeah, I went to Route 207, but
you can’t go there without a Bicycle.\f
I made my team battle and toughened
them up, so it wasn’t a waste.\f
DP.057.0005:
So, I’m going back to Jubilife City.
Next stop, the Eterna Gym Badge!\f
Ten seconds before I dash!\f
Nine...\f
Bah! Who’s got time to count?!\f
DP.057.0006:
Howdy, Trainer!\f
If you don’t have a single Gym Badge,
other Trainers will look down on\r
you like you’re a total noob, right?\f
So, I’ll show you where the town’s
Pokémon Gym is.\f
DP.057.0008:
Is that guy in front of the Gym
your friend?\f
He’s sort of twitchy and impatient.
DP.057.0009:
Oh, hi, you’re back!
The Gym Leader’s waiting for you.
DP.057.0010:
Can I see your Trainer Case?\f
It’s got the Gym Badge you just
won, right?
DP.057.0014:
The Gym Leader went off to work in
the mine.
DP.057.0015:
The Gym Leader is young, but he’s
the mine’s safety supervisor.\f
He’s an expert in more than just one
field!
DP.057.0016:
Everyone’s proud of the mine.\f
They’re digging for coal under the
sea as we speak...\f
It’s amazing how they do it!
DP.057.0017:
Up ahead there’s a huge mountain
that towers above everything.\f
It divides Sinnoh into two distinct
halves.
DP.057.0018:
Have you seen the vents?
They release steam from down below.
DP.057.0020:
These vents exchange the hot air
down below with the fresh air outside.\f
Looking down them gives me the urge
to start yelling into ’em! Hello!
DP.057.0021:
There’s no question. This is hard,
hard work.\f
But working alongside Pokémon...
It gives me a boost somehow.\f
Here, take one of these.\f
DP.057.0022:
Feeling hale and hearty puts a smile
on my face. And that makes me happy.
DP.057.0023:
This pile of dirty sand is called
a slag heap.\f
It’s the waste from sorting coal.
DP.057.0024:
Chop, chop, MACHOP!
Chop, chop away on rocks! ~♫
DP.057.0025:
TMs are single use only, but HMs
can be used over and over.\f
It’s tricky trying to decide which
Pokémon should learn what moves.
DP.057.0026:
When I run around with my Running
Shoes on, it feels like I’m the center\r
of attention!
DP.057.0029:
Oreburgh Pokémon Gym
Leader: Roark\r
“Call me Roark the Rock!”
DP.057.0030:
Oreburgh Mining Museum
“Coal Mining and You!”
DP.057.0031:
Oreburgh Coal Mine
Beware of Busy Pokémon!
